title: Cobblemon Rad Gyms Refurbish
description: Refurbished structures for cobblemon rad gyms.
body:
*Refurbished gym structures, make them more impressive! For modpack [Cobblemon Ori Starlight](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-ori-starlight).*

**Datapack for [Rad Gyms](https://modrinth.com/mod/rad-gyms/), require [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), [CobbleFurnies](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblefurnies) and [Radical Cobblemon Trainers API](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctapi).**
